memoryArtifacts.headline: The family of John Howland, Mayflower passenger: five generations by Hunter, Mardenna Johnson, 1910- pg 1
In Memory of John and Joan Tilley...
Howland House in Plymouth, MA where both John and Elizabeth lived at one point
memoryArtifacts.description: Only remaining house in Plymouth, MA where an actual passenger on the Mayflower lived

memoryArtifacts.headline: Mayflower Families Through Five Generations Vol 23 Part I John Howland part 2 of 4
memoryArtifacts.description: If you are related to John Howland and Elizabeth Tilley then you are also related to three other Mayflower Pilgrims, John and Mrs. John Tilley and their daughter, Elizabeth Tilley.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Tilley於1607年8月30日之前出生在英國貝德福爾亨洛福時，她的父親John Tilley35歲，母親Joan Hurst11604歲。她於1623年3月25日與John Howland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她於1673年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼斯萬希亞。她去世於1687年12月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Tilley于1607年8月30日之前出生在英国貝德福爾亨洛福时，她的父亲John Tilley35岁，母亲Joan Hurst11604岁。她于1623年3月25日与John Howland在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼普萊姆斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她于1673年住在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼斯萬希亞。她去世于1687年12月21日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加普萊姆斯 可隆尼布里斯托斯萬希亞。

nameMeanings.name: Tilley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Tilly-sur-Seulles (Calvados) or Tilly (Eure), France.

English: habitational name from Tyley in Wotton under Edge (Gloucestershire), Tiley in Minterne Magna (Dorset), or Tilley (Shropshire). The Gloucestershire and Dorset placenames derive from Old English tigel ‘tile’ + lēah ‘wood, woodland clearing’. The Shropshire placename derives from an uncertain first element + Old English lēah.
English: occupational name from Middle English tilie ‘one who tills the land, a husbandman’. Compare Tiller .

variants.name: Tillie
meanings: English (northern England and southern Scotland): variant of   Tilley  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain and Ireland.

variants.name: Tiller
meanings: English (southern, especially Hampshire): occupational name from Middle English tiliere, tilyer ‘one who tills the soil, husbandman, farmer, farm laborer’. This is a derivative of Old English tilian ‘to till (the soil)’, Middle English tilie. There has been some confusion of this name with Tyler .

variants.name: Tiley
meanings: English (Gloucestershire, Somerset and Wiltshire): variant of   Tilley  .

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.description: "English navigator Henry Hudson, under contract to the United East India Company, sails from Amsterdam and ""discovers""Manhattan Island and the future site of New York."
In 1620, after 2 rough months at sea, 102 Pilgrims landed at Plymouth Rock and established one of the very first English settlements in America.
Curacao became a colony of the Netherlands.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
End of Eighty Years' War with Spain.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Tilley was born before 30 August 1607, in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, her father, John Tilley, was 35 and her mother, Joan Hurst, was 11604. She married John Howland on 25 March 1623, in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 6 daughters. She lived in Swansea, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America in 1673. She died on 21 December 1687, in Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, and was buried in Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Tilley est née avant 30 août 1607, à Henlow, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Tilley, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Hurst, avait 11604 ans. Elle a épousé John Howland le 25 mars 1623, à Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 6 filles. Elle a vécu à Swansea, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique en 1673. Elle est décédée le 21 décembre 1687, à Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, et a été enterrée à Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Tilley vor 30. August 1607 in Henlow, Bedfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Tilley 35 und ihre Mutter Joan Hurst 11604. Sie hat am 25. März 1623 in Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America John Howland geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 6 Töchter. 1673 hat sie in Swansea, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America gelebt. Sie starb am 21. Dezember 1687 in Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Tilley è nata il prima del 30 agosto 1607 nel Henlow, Bedfordshire, England, sua padre, John Tilley, aveva 35 anni e sua madre, Joan Hurst, aveva 11604 anni. Lei sposato John Howland il 25 marzo 1623, nel Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 6 figlie. Vissuto a Swansea, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America nel 1673. Morì il 21 dicembre 1687, nel Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, e fu sepolta a Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilleyが1607年8月30日以前にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアヘンロウで生まれた時，父John Tilleyは35歳，母Joan Hurstは11604歳であった。1623年3月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニープリモウスでJohn Howlandと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1673年にはイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニースワンセアに住んでいた。彼女は1687年12月21日にイギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルスワンセアで死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカプリモウス コロニーブリストルスワンセアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Tilley(이)가 1607년 8월 30일 이전 영국 베드퍼드실르 헨로에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Tilley(은)는 35세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan Hurst(은)는 11604세였다. 그녀는 1623년 3월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 플림우스에서 John Howland(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1673년도에 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 스완시에서 살았다. 그녀는 1687년 12월 21일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 스완시에서 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 플림우스 콜론이 브리스톨 스완시에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Tilley родилась перед 30 августа 1607 г. в местности хенлоу, бедфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Tilley было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Hurst, 11604. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Howland 25 марта 1623 г. в местности плимоут, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 6 дочерей. Она жила в местности свансеа, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в 1673 году. Она умерла 21 декабря 1687 г. в местности свансеа, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика и была похоронена в местности свансеа, бристол, плимоут колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth Tilley nació antes de 30 de agosto de 1607, en Henlow, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Tilley, tenía 35 años y su mamá, Joan Hurst, tenía 11604 años. Se casó con John Howland el 25 de marzo de 1623, en Plymouth, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 6 hijas. Vivió en Swansea, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America en 1673. Murió el 21 de diciembre de 1687, en Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America, y fue sepultada en Swansea, Bristol, Plymouth Colony, British Colonial America.
